required_skills: Academic content writing and structured knowledge representation
Subject-matter expertise in one or more core academic disciplines (Mathematics, Science, Humanities, or Commerce)
Curriculum alignment with national standards (CBSE, ICSE, IB, NCERT, State Board)
Question bank development including MCQs, short-answer, and long-answer formats
Pedagogical sequencing and concept scaffolding for learner-appropriate content
Copyediting, proofreading, and academic style adherence
Learning objective mapping to content modules
Bloom's Taxonomy application in question and content design
preferred_skills: LaTeX or MathML for typesetting mathematical and scientific content
Familiarity with EdTech platform content management systems and structured authoring tools
Multimedia content scripting for explainer videos and animated lessons
Competitive exam content development (JEE, NEET, UPSC, CAT)
Adaptive learning content tagging for difficulty levels and learning outcomes
Data-driven content iteration based on learner performance analytics
Knowledge of Agile content development workflows and sprint planning
responsibilities: Develop comprehensive, curriculum-aligned academic content including theory notes, worked examples, and practice problems for K-12 or higher education levels
Create well-structured question banks with varied difficulty levels (easy, medium, hard) mapped to specific learning objectives and Bloom's cognitive levels
Collaborate with academic advisors and subject matter experts to ensure content accuracy, depth, and pedagogical appropriateness
Write detailed solution manuals and explanatory answer keys that articulate step-by-step reasoning for complex academic problems
Map all content modules to board or competitive exam syllabi (CBSE, ICSE, JEE, NEET) to ensure comprehensive topic coverage
Review and edit content submitted by freelance authors or SMEs, ensuring consistency in tone, structure, and academic rigor
Tag and classify content items with metadata (topic, subtopic, difficulty, concept tags) for use in adaptive learning and search systems
Develop chapter summaries, concept maps, and revision tools that reinforce key learning outcomes for students
Participate in content audits to identify outdated material and lead updates aligned with latest syllabus revisions or exam pattern changes
Produce scripts and narration text for video lessons, ensuring alignment between spoken content and on-screen visuals
